workflows.name: Hourly Deal Scanner
workflows.description: Scans all deal sources hourly for new profitable opportunities

workflows.name: Penny Scanner
workflows.description: Scans stores for penny/clearance deals every 6 hours

workflows.name: Cashback Tracker
workflows.description: Processes receipt uploads and matches cashback opportunities

workflows.name: Flip Finder
workflows.description: Scans Facebook Marketplace and local listings for flip opportunities

workflows.name: Coupon Stacker
workflows.description: Aggregates and stacks coupons from all sources daily

workflows.name: Profit Calculator
workflows.description: Auto-calculates profit for every new deal found

workflows.name: Deal Ranker
workflows.description: Re-ranks all active deals by AI score every 2 hours

workflows.name: Alert Sender
workflows.description: Sends push notifications for HIGH urgency deals

workflows.name: Revenue Monitor
workflows.description: Tracks daily/weekly/monthly revenue across all bots

workflows.name: Legal Payout Tracker
workflows.description: Scans PACER/FTC for new settlement/payout opportunities weekly

workflows.name: Grant Scanner
workflows.description: Scans government and private grant databases weekly
